# @vllnt/convex-music

> Provider-neutral, cached music catalog as a Convex component — Spotify, Apple Music, and more behind one API.

`@vllnt/convex-music` is a publishable Convex component targeting `convex@^1.36.1`. It caches
normalized music facts — tracks, artists, and albums — in its own sandboxed tables, keyed by an
opaque provider id and cross-referenced by ISRC, each entry with an optional TTL. One typed API
spans every provider (Spotify and Apple Music today; Deezer, MusicBrainz, and Wikidata as adapters).
The host owns auth; the component owns the factual catalog and the host keeps gameplay + editorial,
referencing catalog rows by id / ISRC. `0.1.0` ships the raw cache core (`put`, `get`, `getByIsrc`,
`invalidate`, `pruneExpired`, `stats`); the durable catalog (artists/tracks/playlists), provider
adapters, the in-component import/sync engine, and artist-image auto-sync are planned (see the README).

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Overview, installation, usage, API summary
- [API Reference](docs/API.md): Client methods, value shapes, TTL/cache semantics
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Version history and release notes
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup, validation commands, release workflow

## Examples

- [Example component wrapper](example/convex/example.ts): Host-app wrapper functions
- [Example tests](example/convex/example.test.ts): End-to-end usage coverage with `convex-test`
